Quarto 1.10 includes the following new features:

-  New `quarto.language` Pandoc template-variable namespace, exposing Quarto's resolved [localized strings](/docs/authoring/language.qmd#localized-strings-in-templates) to custom templates and [template partials](/docs/journals/templates.qmd#template-partials):

   ``` default
   $quarto.language.crossref-fig-title$
   $quarto.language.toc-title-document$
   ```
